title: phegopteris ammifolia
intro: Phegopteris ammifolia, also known as the autumn fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phegopteris ammifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Phegopteris ammifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
